message.content:
@startuml
participant "Team Member" as TM
participant "CreateTaskUI" as CTUI
participant "CreateTaskController" as CTR
participant "DataManagement" as DM
participant "projectStore : ProjectStore" as PStore
participant "project : Project" as Project

TM -> CTUI: 1 Starts the Task creation in User Story
CTUI <- TM: 2 request the project code
CTUI -> TM: 3 Inserts the project code
CTUI -> TM: 4 request sprint id
CTUI -> CTUI: 5 Inserts the sprint id
CTUI -> TM: 6 request user story id
CTUI -> CTUI: 7 Inserts the user story id
CTUI -> TM: 8 request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
TM -> CTUI: 9 Inserts request the task information: name, description, type, startDate, endDate
CTUI -> CTUI: 10 createTaskInUserStory(code, sprintID, userStoryID, name, description, type, startDate, endDate)
CTUI -> PStore: 11 projectStore = getProjectStore()
PStore <- CTUI: 12 projectStore
CTUI -> PStore: 13 project = getProjectByCode(code)
PStore -> CTUI: 14 project
CTUI -> Project: 15 getSprintByID(sprintID)
Project -> CTUI: ref TaskCreationInUserStory
CTUI -> CTUI: 16 true
CTUI -> TM: 18 Task created successfully

@enduml
